conditions.name: pulmonary tuberculosis
conditions.note: DST results confirm pan-susceptibility to first-line agents, supporting continuation of current RIPE regimen

medications.name: pyrazinamide 1500 mg oral tablet
medications.note: continued despite mildly elevated uric acid; patient asymptomatic; monitoring to continue

document_references.description: Documents RN Gomez's phone call with Robert Davis to review February 19 lab results (LFTs stable, uric acid mildly elevated) and communicate finalized inpatient sputum culture and drug susceptibility results (M. tuberculosis, pan-susceptible to all first-line agents). Plan to continue RIPE therapy with next in-person visit March 5.

Documents the communication of culture and DST results to the patient, including that the sputum mycobacterial culture was positive for M. tuberculosis and that drug susceptibility testing confirmed susceptibility to rifampin, isoniazid, pyrazinamide, ethambutol, and streptomycin. Patient verbalized understanding.

diagnostic_reports.type: mycobacterial culture and drug susceptibility testing, sputum
